is OFF CALENDAR at the request of the Plaintiff.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT
Off Calendar May-29-2026 Continued To Jun-03-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT

is CONTINUED to June 3, 2026 to be heard by Judge Charles Haines. The Court is unclear whether Petitioner is withdrawing their request for Contempt made via ex parte application on April 21, 2026, based on the Request of Dismissal / Notice of Withdrawal. Petitioner is instructed to contact the Court by June 1, 2026 by filed declaration, clarifying its Notice of Withdrawal and whether it includes the request made by ex parte application.

Visiting Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

Motion To Compel Compliance With Judical Order Confirming Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-14-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER ERIK SEBELLIN-ROSS, SUSANNE SEBELLIN-ROSS Motion To Compel Compliance With Judical Order Confirming Arbitration Award is DENIED. The Court issued its judgment and will not be ordering compliance again. The Court makes no determination on the OSC re: Contempt mentioned in the Motion as it has not been properly requested at this time.
